description: Street address information for customers, employees, and vendors.

columns.name: addressid
columns.description: Primary key for Address records.

columns.name: addressline1
columns.description: First street address line.

columns.name: addressline2
columns.description: Second street address line.

columns.name: city
columns.description: Name of the city.

columns.name: stateprovinceid
columns.description: Unique identification number for the state or province. Foreign key to StateProvince table.

columns.name: postalcode
columns.description: Postal code for the street address.

columns.name: spatiallocation
columns.description: Latitude and longitude of this address.

description: Cross-reference table mapping customers, vendors, and employees to their addresses.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to BusinessEntity.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: addressid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to Address.AddressID.

columns.name: addresstypeid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to AddressType.AddressTypeID.

description: Lookup table containing the ISO standard codes for countries and regions.

columns.name: countryregioncode
columns.description: ISO standard code for countries and regions.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Country or region name.

description: Where to send a person email.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key. Person associated with this email address.  Foreign key to Person.BusinessEntityID

columns.name: emailaddressid
columns.description: Primary key. ID of this email address.

columns.name: emailaddress
columns.description: E-mail address for the person.

description: Human beings involved with AdventureWorks: employees, customer contacts, and vendor contacts.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key for Person records.

columns.name: persontype
columns.description: Primary type of person: SC = Store Contact, IN = Individual (retail) customer, SP = Sales person, EM = Employee (non-sales), VC = Vendor contact, GC = General contact

columns.name: namestyle
columns.description: 0 = The data in FirstName and LastName are stored in western style (first name, last name) order.  1 = Eastern style (last name, first name) order.

columns.name: title
columns.description: A courtesy title. For example, Mr. or Ms.

columns.name: firstname
columns.description: First name of the person.

columns.name: middlename
columns.description: Middle name or middle initial of the person.

columns.name: lastname
columns.description: Last name of the person.

columns.name: suffix
columns.description: Surname suffix. For example, Sr. or Jr.

columns.name: emailpromotion
columns.description: 0 = Contact does not wish to receive e-mail promotions, 1 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks, 2 = Contact does wish to receive e-mail promotions from AdventureWorks and selected partners.

columns.name: additionalcontactinfo
columns.description: Additional contact information about the person stored in xml format.

columns.name: demographics
columns.description: Personal information such as hobbies, and income collected from online shoppers. Used for sales analysis.

description: Telephone number and type of a person.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Business entity identification number. Foreign key to Person.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: phonenumber
columns.description: Telephone number identification number.

columns.name: phonenumbertypeid
columns.description: Kind of phone number. Foreign key to PhoneNumberType.PhoneNumberTypeID.

description: Type of phone number of a person.

columns.name: phonenumbertypeid
columns.description: Primary key for telephone number type records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the telephone number type

columns.name: stateprovinceid
columns.description: Primary key for StateProvince records.

columns.name: stateprovincecode
columns.description: ISO standard state or province code.

columns.name: countryregioncode
columns.description: ISO standard country or region code. Foreign key to CountryRegion.CountryRegionCode.

columns.name: isonlystateprovinceflag
columns.description: 0 = StateProvinceCode exists. 1 = StateProvinceCode unavailable, using CountryRegionCode.

columns.name: name
columns.description: State or province description.

columns.name: territoryid
columns.description: ID of the territory in which the state or province is located. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

description: Types of addresses stored in the Address table.

columns.name: addresstypeid
columns.description: Primary key for AddressType records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Address type description. For example, Billing, Home, or Shipping.

description: Source of the ID that connects vendors, customers, and employees with address and contact information.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key for all customers, vendors, and employees.

description: Cross-reference table mapping stores, vendors, and employees to people

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to BusinessEntity.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: personid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to Person.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: contacttypeid
columns.description: Primary key.  Foreign key to ContactType.ContactTypeID.

description: Lookup table containing the types of business entity contacts.

columns.name: contacttypeid
columns.description: Primary key for ContactType records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Contact type description.

columns.name: passwordhash
columns.description: Password for the e-mail account.

columns.name: passwordsalt
columns.description: Random value concatenated with the password string before the password is hashed.
